info.name: Car Rental API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Car Rental System.

## Setup
1. Run `php artisan migrate --seed`
2. Run `php artisan serve`
3. Use the pre-seeded tokens or call login endpoints to get a token.

## Test Credentials
- Admin: admin@admin.com / password
- Customer: customer@customer.com / password
